_note: Missing relative `.svelte` import. tsgo can't see it — svelte's own `declare module '*.svelte'` wildcard (simulated here by svelte-shim.d.ts) resolves the specifier to `any`. The default `svelte-check` reports TS2307 via its on-disk resolver; we recover that parity with a native check. Anchored at the specifier's opening quote (0-based line 6, char 22).
